response:
1. THE CENTRAL CIRCLE HAS A RADIUS OF $ r $ CM. THE NEXT CIRCLE HAS A RADIUS THAT IS 10% LARGER THAN THE PREVIOUS ONE, AND THIS PATTERN CONTINUES FOR A TOTAL OF 8 CONCENTRIC CIRCLES. CALCULATE THE TOTAL AREA COVERED BY ALL 8 CIRCLES COMBINED. EXPRESS YOUR ANSWER IN TERMS OF $ r $ AND $ \pi $.

2. TO ADD A TOUCH OF TRADITIONAL TYPOGRAPHY, THE DESIGNER DECIDES TO PLACE TEXT ALONG THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE 5TH CIRCLE. IF THE CIRCUMFERENCE OF THE 5TH CIRCLE IS USED TO EVENLY SPACE TEXT CHARACTERS SUCH THAT THERE IS A 0.5 CM GAP BETWEEN EACH CHARACTER, AND THE TOTAL NUMBER OF CHARACTERS (INCLUDING SPACES) MUST BE AN INTEGER, DETERMINE THE MAXIMUM NUMBER OF CHARACTERS THAT CAN BE PLACED ALONG THIS CIRCUMFERENCE.

THE RESPONSE MUST BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. ONLY USE UNIQUE WORDS IN YOUR RESPONSE, NO WORD SHOULD BE REPEATED! IN YOUR RESPONSE, THE LETTER I SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 11 TIMES.

THE RESPONSE MUST START AND END WITH THE SAME WORD. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF SENTENCES MUST BE LESS THAN 36. ALL WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS SHOULD APPEAR LESS THAN THREE TIMES. THE RESPONSE MUST BE COMPLETE AND MEET ALL THE GIVEN CONSTRAINTS.
